pageBaseline: Track the URLs cited by LLMs, the models that reuse them, and the external sites that strengthen your visibility.
citedPagesDescription: URLs from your site detected in AI answers.
searchPlaceholder: Search by URL, domain, or model
geoNeedsDescription: High-leverage actions based on observed citations.
geoOpportunitiesEmpty: Opportunities will appear as soon as citations become available.
citationSourcesDescription: External domains that appear as sources alongside your brand.
modelLeaderboardDescription: Models that reuse your pages most often as sources.
noLlmYet: No LLM cites a site page yet.
visibilityDescription: Share of responses citing this URL
diversifyLlmCoverageDescription: This page is still picked up by a single model. Strengthen proof points, comparisons, and explicit phrasing to increase cross-LLM coverage.
extendCoveredNeedDescription: This page is already picked up by several models. Turn the prompt angles citing it into more specific pages to capture the GEO long tail.
extendLongTailDescription: Citations are concentrated on a few URLs. Expand winning angles into more targeted pages to capture more prompts.
diversifyLlmsDescription: The best page is still carried by too few models. Rework proof signals to increase its multi-LLM pickup.
createExternalRelayDescription: No third-party domain stands out yet. Comparisons, directories, and partners can strengthen credibility reused by AI systems.
